prompt: I'm getting 'toomanyrequests: You have reached your unauthenticated pull rate limit' when doing az acr build on our cafehyna ACR registry. The Dockerfile pulls FROM nginx:1.25 directly from Docker Hub. How do I fix this so all pulls stay within ACR?

assertions.text: Recommends az acr import to pull the image into ACR
Shows the correct az acr import command with --source docker.io/nginx:1.25
Updates the Dockerfile FROM to reference cafehyna.azurecr.io instead of Docker Hub
Explains that ACR cloud builds are unauthenticated against Docker Hub
Includes a rebuild command using az acr build
